name: @aristotle/service-runtime
description: Service-runtime helpers for AristotleOS services. Ships consistent /healthz (liveness) + /readyz (readiness) + /health (legacy) endpoints with structured response bodies that operators can wire to k8s probes, plus a small ReadinessChecks builder for composing per-service readiness conditions. Designed so every service ships the same probe surface area without duplicating the boilerplate in each service's index.ts.
